page_title: "pdnd_tenant_verified_attribute Resource - PDND"

  Assigns a verified attribute to a PDND tenant.

# pdnd_tenant_verified_attribute (Resource)

Assigns a verified attribute to a PDND tenant. The assignment is immutable — any change triggers replacement.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pdnd_tenant_verified_attribute" "example" {
  tenant_id    = data.pdnd_tenant.example.id
  attribute_id = data.pdnd_verified_attribute.example.id
  agreement_id = pdnd_agreement.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `agreement_id` (String) Agreement UUID
- `attribute_id` (String) Attribute UUID
- `tenant_id` (String) Tenant UUID

### Optional

- `expiration_date` (String) Expiration date (RFC3339 timestamp)

### Read-Only

- `assigned_at` (String) Assignment timestamp
- `id` (String) Composite ID: tenant_id/attribute_id

## Import

```shell
terraform import pdnd_tenant_verified_attribute.example <tenant-uuid>/<attribute-uuid>
```
